channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: RAG pipelines: 60% latency hidden in serialization
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 93% to 55 ms at 5 000 users with one serialization fix and cache redesign — the moves tutorials skip and the exact versions that worked in production 2026.

item.title: From 12k to 220k: how I priced my skills globally
item.description: Earned $220/hour globally after starting at $30/hour locally — the pricing model, contracts, and case studies that worked in 2026

item.title: Edge functions: stop guessing, measure first
item.description: Cut API p99 latency 65% with Workers or Edge — concrete benchmarks, code samples, and the hidden costs most docs omit

item.title: LeetCode won’t land you remote dev jobs
item.description: Ship a real service to pass remote tech interviews — the self-taught guide with Go, Redis, and Fly.io examples. 5 concrete steps and real latency numbers.

item.title: AI coding: 5 stacks shipping today
item.description: Cut deployment time 80% with FastAPI + SQLite + Fly.io — zero DevOps, $0 cost at 100 users, and a 0.7% error rate under load

item.title: Portfolio beats platforms: remote hiring from Africa
item.description: Land remote backend roles from Nairobi with a portfolio that proves impact, not just code. Includes latency benchmarks, cost breakdowns, and Terraform deployments—metrics that get interviews at US fintechs.

item.title: Rate your worth: 2026 freelance data
item.description: Set freelance rates that cover taxes, late fees, and your rent in 2026 — with a spreadsheet, contract clauses, and real invoices from 247 gigs.

item.title: pgvector beats vector DBs in most cases
item.description: Run semantic search 10x cheaper with PostgreSQL pgvector 0.7.0 — benchmark shows when a dedicated vector database only adds cost and latency.

item.title: Rewrite mobile backends for 5G: 300ms to 30ms
item.description: TT and 10–20% packet loss you see on 5G mid with Rewrite mobile backends 5G — be a single misconfigured timeout — this post is wh.

item.title: Negotiate Fair Remote Pay Across Borders
item.description: Negotiate remote salary 20% higher with Payscale API — average salary data for 10 countries, including Brazil and Mexico.

item.title: 37% less cloud carbon, same 99th percentile
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 37% without adding latency—ARM Graviton3, schema serialization, and structured logging wins with hard numbers and code.

item.title: Which realtime tool fits your case
item.description: Choose between WebSockets, SSE, and long polling in 2026 with real latency, cost, and code metrics. Find the right tool for your use case in under 30 minutes.

item.title: Multi-tenant DB: don’t lock yourself out
item.description: Cut tenant isolation costs 40% by starting with separate PostgreSQL databases instead of RLS or schemas — real benchmarks, migration pitfalls, and a Go router you can deploy today

item.title: Over-engineering kills velocity: our 2026 rewrite
item.description: Cut API latency 97% and costs 91% by removing Kafka, Flink, and Kubernetes — here’s the exact Go + PostgreSQL stack that worked in 2026

item.title: Message queues: 30ms vs 3s failures
item.description: Cut queue latency 70% with real benchmarks — RabbitMQ 3.13 vs Kafka 3.7 vs Redis Streams 7.2. Includes failure modes, code samples, and a 30-minute fix checklist.

item.title: Cache before queries: why AI systems stall
item.description: Cut AI API response time 97% with a three-layer cache — bloom filter, sharded Redis, and event-driven pre-warm. Benchmarks, code, and failure modes from a live 2026 system.

item.title: Senior devs flee when on-call sucks
item.description: leave for 20% more stock. They leave becaus with senior devs quit tech — told me: “We paid them €120k base, €40k bonus, and.

item.title: Why live demos lie about production
item.description: Cut API response time 78% by bounding LLM connection pools — the silent socket leak most vibe-coded services miss

item.title: AI pipelines: the cache you forgot to warm
item.description: ives a 50–70% hit-rate on day one, even bef with AI pipelines cache you — build a pipeline: fetch data, chunk it, embed it, s.

item.title: Senior devs quit for autonomy, not cash
item.description: Senior devs quit tech: 025. Only 12% named compensation as their t. Practical guide with real examples.
